relations.name: experience_moments
relations.description: Every Moment belongs to exactly one Experience; every Experience must have at least one Moment.

relations.name: moment_promises
relations.description: Every Promise belongs to exactly one Moment; every Moment must carry at least one Promise.

relations.name: promise_acceptance_checks
relations.description: Every Acceptance Check belongs to exactly one Promise; every Promise must declare at least one deterministic Acceptance Check.

relations.name: promise_evidence_ledgers
relations.description: Every Evidence Ledger cites at least one source Promise; every Promise must be cited by at least one Evidence Ledger.

relations.name: acceptance_check_evidence
relations.description: Every Evidence Ledger check:evidence-coverage row points to exactly one Promise Acceptance Check; every Promise Acceptance Check must have at least one evidence row.
